name: Jovial
text: This aspect of you is passive.  Meaning it offers up a wise and reverent approach to sharing memories and a precognitive understanding of life. You are engaging and good-natured; a joyful person who naturally invokes the confidence of others through your exuberant and cheerful disposition. This provides you with an availability factor that affords you an attractive quality at social events. You also possess an absorptive nature that affords you proficiency in consuming and archiving vast amounts of information. Additionally, you are able to recapitulate content and experiences with very little effort. This lends itself to a deep understanding of the world and those in it.  You are well liked and needed by others. People love you.

name: Jovial
text: You are extremely absorptive. This means you can archive vast amounts of information easily. Much like a library, you are able to draw from experiences and concepts and hold onto content permanently.  This makes you somewhat of a walking encyclopedia when it comes to anything of interest or applied necessity. Providing you make healthy choices for yourself; this aspect lends itself to extreme intelligence. It affords you the opportunity to process, store and deliver information at will. Because of this combination, your understanding of love and life is very deep as opposed to being superficial. You are also an extremely entertaining individual who makes others feel warm and welcome. This availability factor invites others to be in your presence.  This is just one part of you and is very passive in nature.

name: Power
text: ACCOMPLISHMENT motivates you. This feature is all about accomplishing goals with or without the consensus of others. You naturally have the ability to make things happen and consequently may become restless if no goals are in sight and frustrated where goals are set too high. Pursuing unrealistic goals can invoke an intimidating quality in you that is not attractive to others, further keeping you from achieving success in a manner that is healthy and natural. Because accomplishing goals serves as your oxygen needed to proceed, it is vital that reasonable daily goals always be a part of your routine. Be careful to not set unreasonable benchmarks for yourself. Without consistency, this feature can be extremely merciless in achieving its desired objective â€“ which is ultimately to win. Keep your expectations attainable and intelligence will prevail in all of your pursuits.

name: Vanity
text: AESTHETIC SENSIBILITY motivates you. This feature is responsible for creating and maintaining the beautiful environments in which you can give and gain attention. Without this, the world would have a lack-luster appeal to many. Your presentation holds great significance not only to yourself but to others as well. It literally becomes the driving force behind all that is important to you as you gravitate towards opportunities to present yourself to the world, whether it is the world of family, work or at-large. This pull towards receiving attention is natural for all of us for without attention we would lose our desire to thrive. However, when this is a driving force one must take personal responsibility for seeing to it that they get opportunities to share their wisdom and display their gifts. It does not mean you have to subscribe to being a rock star (some do) but it does mean that conversations with one or more individuals must be a part of your daily routine. Meaningful exchanges with colleagues, friends and family are a must. Your personal presentation produces thoughtful consideration versus happenstance. Compliments become you because they feed you. In a relationship, receiving daily praises will keep you content and energized. This is not necessary for everyone. This talent is essentially responsible for creating beauty in the world, be it in architecture, interior decorating or apparel design. It sets the standard. It is something you require in order to stay healthy in any environment. If you are not exercising your creative talents, it would be wise to make time for them. Individuals with this feature often make spectacular salespeople. Should you experience a lack of attention or opportunities to shine, you can become self-absorbed. Make sure that you volunteer for assignments that require your aesthetic sensibility and performance potential.

Alchemy addresses your refinement preferences; whether you are meticulous, practical, messy, and what you can tolerate in others. The Knowledge of Y.O.U. uses the analogy of ore to exemplify states of refinement, specifically Gold, Silver and Copper. Alchemy determines where your "BOUNDARIES" begin and end. This range identifies what you can tolerate in terms of people, places and things and how to best manage your choices in maximizing your energy potential. Alchemical incompatibility is the number one reason for challenges in relationships. Not addressing boundary issues in any relationship can result in relationship failure.  In business and in life it is vital to know what your personal alchemical range of tolerance is so that you can better understand your own boundaries and those around you.

name: Self Pity
text: COMPASSION is motivates you. It provides you with a great personal concern for others. Being of service to others feeds you and keeps you feeling aligned. You naturally make others feel better through your inviting and caring manner. By continuing to surround yourself with opportunities and environments that require your loving attentions you will ensure your own vitality. When there is no opportunity to give or gift your talents and deeds, you may focus your compassionate nature inward and exhibit sorrowful and self-centered behaviors. It is very important that you stay out of your SELF and into others. This is not the case for everyone but it is necessary for your own INTELLIGENT survival. Failure to seek out service oriented opportunities can result in becoming self-pitiful.

name: Copper
text: Your test results revealed that you have a COPPER level of refinement. Since alchemy is the main player in relationships, if oneâ€™s alchemy is too high it can be quite intolerant of others. This is frequently helpful to know in selecting partners, jobs and places to live. A Copper alchemy is very adaptable when it comes to living simply. Often times the daily issues that others have with household chores, maintaining possessions and dressing for success, fall by the wayside in terms of priorities. Coppers are very tolerant of messes, dishes in the sink and piles of dirty laundry. They do not feel the urgency to make the bed, empty the garbage or have a meticulous environment in order to entertain. Often times Coppers are judged unfairly in that their primitive and more organic lifestyle appears to be a choice of neglect when in fact it is something that they create intentionally for reasons of personal comfort. They thrive best in a lived-in environment. It reveals to them that life has been experienced here and this brings them a sense of participating in life. All Coppers do very well with pets. Cat and dog hair, smells and stains on the carpet again just serve as reminders that life is in session and they are a part of it. This breeds a sense of self-significance and self-confidence. Coppers get a bad rap for being slobs and careless when in fact the intention that lies behind their performance is never directed at trying to achieve mediocrity or destruction. Unfortunately, High Silvers and Golds can be extremely critical and intolerant of Coppers in an effort to try and change them. Silvers are typically the easiest to get along with and can move in any environment. By virtue they have an easier compatibility range. Coppers, like Golds do not have the variety of friends that Silvers do. Coppers can raise their tolerance and increase their mass appeal by simply cleaning up their environment and paying more attention to their physical appearance. Typically Coppers rarely judge others as they do not congregate in areas where they do not feel welcome. They do however, see themselves as clean and presentable in terms of what feels friendly and welcoming to them. Often times they have an easy going approach to life and see their purpose as one of encouraging others to just relax. Alchemical incompatibility or defining refinement intolerance is often the very reason we misjudge others.

name: Copper
text: Your test results revealed that you have a COPPER/SILVER level of refinement. Since alchemy is the main player in relationships, if oneâ€™s alchemy is too high it can be quite intolerant of others. This is frequently helpful to know in selecting partners, jobs and places to live. The more Silver you have the easier it is to tolerate others. Silvers can move in any environment. By virtue they have an wider compatibility range. Silvers can walk away from a messy room, are a little more flexible and make friends easily! Golds are a little more meticulous and inflexible and cannot tolerate a Copper preference at all. They often take issue with the little annoyances that come with kids, messes and things left lying about. A Copper/Silver on the other hand actually tolerates these types of environmental occurrences quite well. Copper/Silvers usually live in areas that share a relaxed and in some cases, a rural approach to life. They can tolerate quite a bit but do not do well living in areas that have too much Gold. They can however, visit or vacation in these areas for a very short period of time... like an afternoon. Both high Silver and low Copper can be tolerated by you. Silvers are not messy but many have organized piles. A Copper/Silver will let the piles lay about and accumulate and rarely feel the need to remove them from sight if company were to arrive. Some piles may even be ready for the trash rather than filing. Like the solid Silver you have a much wider spectrum of friends. But like any Copper you may periodically experience criticism for your lack of urgency or attention to detail when it comes to being tidy. Because your presentation does quite well in both high Silver arenas and low Copper venues you have many choices as well as much to see and participate in during your lifetime. Traveling to 3rd world countries and living among the natives comes natural to you, as long as it is only temporary. You can tolerate smells and the lack of creature comforts quite well and could easily adapt to coarse and rugged environments. In an effort to increase your own field of influence and enhance your tolerance range, it would be wise to make adjustments towards your Silver. This would require that you become a little more attentive to your home and self in terms of upkeep and value maintenance. Be considerate of the alchemy of others as it is often the very reason we misjudge.

name: Fear
text: CREATING PROTECTION motivates you. When threats are perceived in life you immediately take preventative measures to correct the situation. You are always looking out for the best interests of yourself and others in striving to create safe environments for all. When you find it difficult to resolve issues of concern, there is a tendency to panic. Inappropriate fear creates panic on a larger scale and in extreme cases can start wars and crush the economy. We see this in our media and those that exhibit fear are most sensitive to it. Realizing your sensitive nature, it is vital that you create a litmus test or reality check that you can enlist daily in making intelligent decisions. It is important to know that people like yourself are largely responsible for our civilized environment, meaning without healthy fear, there would be no laws on the books to protect us. Thus, when you are not creating protection, be it crusading for a crosswalk, insisting everyone grab their umbrella, or replacing the brake pads just in case, you will begin to lose energy. Always find some way to improve upon civilization. We need you.

name: Dominance
text: CREATING ORDER motivates you. This feature often gets a bad rap as one of being "controlling" but the truth is that it is trying to organize and list things in an effort to proceed on the road of life. This orderly nature is a very attractive trait when serving in a leadership capacity, as it is able to access what is required without much delay. It does this by organizing, maximizing and delegating. When you surround yourself with healthy opportunities to create order in all aspects of your life you continue to rise to your full potential. Given the nature of your feature or driving force, it is important that you realize how essential it is to live and work in an organized environment. Creating order actually invigorates you and gives you a sense of personal fulfillment. Impressing this innate need upon your family and colleagues is equally significant as your desire to establish efficiency and right the ship may often be taken personally. Let them know it is NEVER about them. Intelligently release your expectations of others as their needs may differ from yours. No manipulation is needed to create the order you require to accomplish your objectives. You must always focus on creating order in all areas of your life if you are to stay fed and nourished. Should you reach a point where you are out of things to organize or address be careful to not become manipulative. It is wise to seek out more to organize in an effort to continue to fuel your vehicle and keep you moving forward effectively.

name: Solar
text: You are a vibrant and delightful person with an optimistic view of reality. You are also extremely kind and considerate. This genuine, accepting character allows for an inviting presence that makes you very approachable in business and in life. When performing or connecting with others you maintain a comfortable ease that makes your presentation believable and entertaining. This disposition is a natural expression of your nature. It is only one aspect of you but is responsible for moments of playfulness and creativity. You cultivate many interests and tend to access brilliance through innocence. You also process information at lightning speed from an active and positive perspective. Your tendency is to address what is working first in an environment or situation. This positive approach coupled with your radiance allows you to simply light up a room!

name: Solar
text: This part of you displays a playful disposition accompanied by a charming and delightful quality. You are approachable, timeless, effervescent and a natural performer. Center stage becomes you. This trait is something that you can access easily and call on for making friendly connections with others. Life is your audience and you are here to uplift the spirits of others. You are "HOPE" springs eternal. It simply makes you a pleasure to be around. You process information at lightning speed extracting what is working while overlooking dysfunction. This permits you the ability to instantaneously disseminate information into a digestible and friendly solution. This is great for making conversation and developing healthy relationships. Fragility accompanies this part of your nature. Your desire to trust often supercedes an obvious threat. Take special care in picking people, places and opportunities wisely.

name: Emotional
text: This Center loves the taste of life as it relates to emotion and is greatly moved by it. It is best fed by positive relationships and the dynamics that they have to offer. There is a great need to feel, touch and be within close proximity to living things. Having people, plants and animals around often make your environment stimulating and opens your heart to discussions, learning and experiences. Emotionally centered people require friendships and often eat when relationships are not going well. Networking and social engagements keep you feeling aligned. Emotionally centered people like yourself, tend to take things to heart. It is often more difficult for you to detach from pre-existing relationships. You may find yourself easily drawn the problems of others.

name: Mars
text: Integrity becomes you. You are a crusader by nature. Truth and Justice serve as the impetus for many of your actions. This part of you is where physical energy resides. Depending on the size or significance of this aspect, your desire to fix situations and circumstances will prevail accordingly. Typically, your physicality is always on a mission and wanting to "save the day". You naturally know that the shortest distance between two points is a straight line and you attack the challenges of life head on. Your goal is to get the job done without interruption. This quick to respond nature often leaps before it looks and speaks before it thinks. Because this trait is honorable with high standards, it will push for those standards if the need arises.

name: Mars
text: This part of you is filled with integrity and believes strongly in truth and justice. You are extremely enthusiastic, passionate and honorable with high standards and will push for those standards if the need arises. This is the most energetic aspect of your physicality. When a task presents itself to you, your goal is to get the job done without interruption. You thrive on taking action and will take the shortest distance between A and B. This active part of your style is also negative in nature which means that you are driven to fix what is not working in a situation and forge on to correct things. It gives you the ability to eliminate threats.

Your energy pool exceeds the usual standard and has much to offer you and your environment in terms of engagement and stamina. This level of efficiency is usually a sign of personal care and conscious living, however it is not impervious to toxicity. A large toxic energy pool can reek a lot of havoc and do a significant amount of damage, where a clear field largely contributes to the whole and the betterment of mankind. In an effort to maintain the integrity of your own self-preservation, take time to clear your mind and soothe the physical nature of who you are. Pick your friends and colleagues wisely. Your choices in this lifetime will produce successful outcomes when properly initiated.

Your energy pool at this point in time is over pronounced. Often times we can begin to spin out of control in our attempts to meet the challenges of life. When your energy reaches an ABOVE THE NORM assessment, there is concern for not only your total health and well being but also those around you. Staying in a hypertrophied state too long feels like a tornado coming through with you being the tornado. We often refer to this as BIG ENERGY. This eventually puts strain on your nervous system and can result in mental exhaustion which can lead to toxicity. Take time everyday to do something that is less demanding and more pleasurable. Make shorter lists. Take up quiet time, listening to music, going to the movies, spending time in nature, singing, journaling and personal pampering. It is vital that you incorporate one or more healthy activities into your daily routine so as to begin to resume a more manageable presentation of yourself.

Your energy pool is satisfactory and responds naturally to the ebb and flow of life. Realizing that life can get difficult at times impresses upon us the need to stock up. With an average life source available, you may want to consider choosing three days a week where you invest some of your time specifically on self-renewal so as not to fall prey to unwarranted intrusion. Often times, being broad-sided unexpectedly can throw us into a state of deficit. Know that you have enough energy to present well but having a little extra in the bank is not to be taken lightly. We live in a toxic world and you will encounter challenges in this life. We suggest you be prepared for all kinds of opportunities that require vital energy.

Energy Centers or "COMMUNICATION STYLE" determine how we relate, connect and learn from our environment. They are responsible for how we commit information and experiences to memory. There are four centers: Intellectual, Moving, Emotional and Instinctual. Our pronounced center of energy largely determines how we initially connect with the moment. Everyone is different, and knowing this information can be vital in communicating and connecting effectively with the world in which we live.  The centers are listed below from most prominent to least prominent in you. They exemplify the doors to your house of self. The first door represents the front door. Opening this door is essential in initiating the process of accessing those that follow. When all are open, a memory is established.

Your energy pool is extremely large and very impressive. You likely are very successful in any and all pursuits. Manifesting and realizing dreams is a natural talent for you because there is an abundance of life force available. This means when everyone else has run out of steam, you still keep going with little or no energy loss. Like being muscularly fit, your energy pool allows you to get more done without experiencing premature fatigue. Maintaining energy efficiency is a sign of self-mastery. Given this insight, it is vital that you always come from a place of integrity in all your pursuits. Make your gifts count and remain accountable.

Your energy pool at this point in time is compromised. Often times unexpected life changes, fatigue, worry, toxic work environments or health issues will begin to tap into our energy as a means of survival. When your energy reaches a FAIR assessment, there is concern for your total health and well being. Staying in a FAIR state too long leaves you vulnerable to physical strain and mental exhaustion. Take time everyday to do something that you love. This could be quiet time, listening to music, going to the movies, spending time in nature, singing, journaling and personal pampering. It is vital that you incorporate one or more healthy activities into your daily routine so as to begin to restore your energy pool to a more natural state.

Our Energy Pool represents how much physical energy you have to expend on a daily basis. Much like staying hydrated, we must guard its appropriation of use. Some activities, choices, people, places and things can rob us of vital energy and depending upon the nature of those things or choices, we may or may not be able to recoup it. In this lifetime, our goal is to maintain an average or better volume of energy. This makes life more manageable and keeps us from being vulnerable to toxic abuse. The need for fortifying our presentation can be met by living a more naturally suited life.

Features or "MOTIVATORS" address what drives us, what must be fed and honored so that we can reach our destination successfully. We have 12 passengers in our vehicle of self all chattering at the same time but only some are licensed to drive. Knowing how to keep these legally authorized drivers in the front seat and motivated allows for efficient travel. These driving forces represent specific laws of nature that show up in all living things. These motivators express themselves as strengths and weaknesses. It is our personal responsibility to come from a place of strength. Strength transmits intelligence while weakness produces ignorance. Choosing opportunities that feed your strengths, your talents and your passion will bring you closer to states of intelligence. What motivates or drives you requires you choose those listed below in order of proficiency.

The results documented in your Performance Report address the uniqueness and perfection of YOU. We call this Report Your Operating Manual.

Your physicality, or physical traits, reveal your natural talents and capabilities which determine your innate potential. They reveal what drives you and how to fuel this drive; how your personal preferences impact your boundaries of tolerance for people and places; how you specifically connect with your environment, relate to others and download information and how your unique perception of life has an electromagnetic impact on all of your relationships.

Your Operating Manual identifies what is required for you to maintain a healthy state. Because the Ultimate Life Tool technology is so multifaceted and multidimensional, to maximize the value of your Operating Manual or if you have questions about your results, we invite you to contact the certified practitioner below for a personal consultation.

Your personal consultation will identify areas that need and require your focus and attention in order to reach your full potential on a daily basis.  It will also provide you with specific strategies to help you integrate and apply the information from your Operating Manual in every aspect of your life.

For services and certification contact your ULT assessment provider.

name: Gold
text: Your test results reveal that you have a Gold level of refinement. Since alchemy is the main player in relationships, if oneâ€™s alchemy is too high it can be quite intolerant of others. This is frequently helpful to know in selecting partners, jobs and places to live. The more Silver you have the more flexible and tolerant you are of those around you. Silvers are the easiest to get along with and can move in any environment. By virtue they have a wider compatibility range. Silvers can walk away from a messy room, are a little more resilient and make friends easily! Golds are a little more meticulous and inflexible. It would serve you to try leaving the bed unmade for a day or two or things laying about. This would afford your alchemy a chance to move towards Silver where more people live. Golds typically live very private lives, even those who need and want people around them. A subtle adjustment towards Silver allows you to reach a greater populous of people versus just a small segment of mankind. Golds can be extremely sensitive to smells and frequently feel uncomfortable in environments that are not in perfect alignment with their lifestyle preferences. Where they eat, what they eat, where they live and the kinds of creature comforts they select are usually of quality or mimic something of high quality quite well. Friends, family and invited guests often feel uneasy in a high Gold environment for fear of displacing something. Golds do not do well visiting under developed countries or witnessing poverty and pestilence. In brief, you are not a good candidate for the Peace Corps. Unfortunately, Golds get a bad rap because their need for quality and perfection is often perceived by others as a superiority complex. The term OCD has become very popular and people often treat it as if it were a disease when in many cases, it is simply a Gold state of being; the higher the Gold, the more meticulous one becomes. Alchemy or Refinement is often the reason we misjudge others.

name: Gold
text: Your test results revealed that you have a Gold/Silver level of refinement. Since alchemy is the main player in relationships, if oneâ€™s alchemy is too high it can be quite intolerant of others. This is frequently helpful to know in selecting partners, jobs and places to live. The more silver you have the easier it is to have tolerance for those around you. Silvers can move in any environment. By virtue they have an wider compatibility range. Silvers can walk away from a messy room, are a little more flexible and make friends easily! Golds are more meticulous and inflexible. It would serve you to try leaving the bed unmade for a day or two or things laying about. This would afford your alchemy a chance to move more towards your silver where more people live. Golds typically live very private lives, even those that need and want people around them. However, your Silver allows you to reach a greater populous of people versus just a small segment of mankind. Golds are very sensitive to smells and frequently feel uncomfortable in environments that are not in perfect alignment with their lifestyle preferences. Where they eat, what they eat, where they live and the kinds of creature comforts they select are usually of quality or mimic something of high quality quite well. Gold/Silvers can display some of these characteristics depending on the level of Gold influence in their alchemical make-up. You would not do well visiting under developed countries or witnessing poverty and pestilence. In brief, you are not a good candidate for the Peace Corps. Fortunately, the Silver in you will offset some of the obsessive tendencies that often accompany a Gold alchemy. It will also allow you to relax a little when it comes to participating in less refined environments. Camping versus hotels is really not an option and you have to have a structured tolerance for pets and children, meaning that certain boundaries and rules must be in place in order for them to co-exist with you. It is always wise to reach for the Silver rather than Gold when it comes to making friends and influencing people as this is the largest demographic that exists on the planet in civilized environments. Many opportunities to experience more of life will present themselves if you can do this. Alchemy or Refinement is often the reason we misjudge others.

name: Non-existence
text: HUMILITY, often referred to as Non-Existence, motivates you. It is the epitome of the selfless observer who can assess any situation without personal ego. Non-Existence does not mean that you are not present. It simply means that you have the ability to go into your own space at times and separate yourself from others. This peaceful nature is one of the qualities that is so attractive about you. It reveals the humility within that draws others to you. People with this disappearing talent are very easy to be around and make excellent friends, confidants and great listeners. At times others will exhaust your energy and you will find yourself going into your own space. The best fuel for Non-Existence is to take time alone to process your experiences and recharge your batteries. This is necessary for you as long as you recognize that you are simply refueling and not escaping. Fatigue and other challenges in life can force you to neglect important aspects of your life in an attempt to feed itself. Stay clear and rested and youâ€™ll stay intelligently diplomatic and reverent.

name: Destructive
text: INITIATING CHANGE motivates you. This natural talent of transforming is all about bringing about change. This feature contributes to mankind by tearing things down and reconstructing them. It initiates change and paves the way for new beginnings. It actually opens the door for new opportunities. It is a transformative process that is necessary for you and you must find environments that allow you to experience this process in order to move forward. Like tearing down a house to build a new improved home, there is a sense of betterment for the whole, especially in business. You must pay attention to your intention and the manner of integrity behind your pursuits and actions. To keep in check, look for opportunities to remodel, restructure or refurbish. Should you find yourself deprived of opportunity or lacking balance, the tendency to quiet this feature versus feed it appropriately may elicit toxic behavior. Toxicity in this feature often results in addiction and/or violent outbreaks.

name: Instinctual
text: This Center is happiest sensing life. The Instinctual Center likes to indulge in anything sensorial. It wants it all because it is aware of it all. Thrill seekers are often instinctually centered. You are drawn to things based on whether or not they look good, taste good, smell good, sound good and feel good. For the most part your energy center responds easily to exercise. If you feel compromised in terms of fitness, know that your body will display results sooner rather than later. Instinctually centered people may get a bad rap from time to time as being judgmental because of their sensitivity. It is difficult for them to hide the manner in which they naturally deduce the moment.

name: Intellectual
text: This Center is happiest entertaining new concepts. These individuals like to curl up with a good book, go to the library and engage in heady discussions about the meaning of life. Intellectually centered people love to think rather than do. They are sometimes more pre-occupied with the Workings of Something vs The Something itself. Your Intellectual Center allows you the ability to think on your feet and to question the fabric of life as it intersects with yours. Things need to make sense to you. You put much thought into projects or ideas. The result of your need to know can get in your way of finding the answer. In a relationship or when communicating with others, if you are not intellectually challenged you will soon find yourself bored and look for mental stimulation elsewhere. It is important to acknowledge that others may not open up to the moment in the same way that you do.

The ULT Summary Report serves to identify those aspects about you that define and direct your best performance qualities. Since your physical being is respectively the assigned vehicle transporting you through this lifetime, it's often helpful to know what kind of vehicle you are. The Greeks have been insisting we "Know Thyself" for centuries. This simple request answered can facilitate success in all aspects of life including one's performance in conducting business and creating healthy relationships at work and in life. The ULT technology is a patented instrument registered and branded as The Ultimate Life Tool. The methodology serving as the foundation for its development is referred to as The Knowledge of Y.O.U. (your own understanding). This cumulative insight is older than the language of man and is founded in physical law and scientific objective understanding. The ULT assessment tool queries and quantifies information and identifies results in a manner that can be easily understood. Your personal ULT Performance Report introduces you to Y.O.U. and provides you with your own operating manual. These operating guidelines support you in making conscious choices in selecting opportunities that will naturally advance you in this lifetime. When you use your natural talents versus learned talents you gain energy. Maximizing your fuel efficiency allows you to access your true self and enjoy life in the process.

This advanced human assessment curriculum and technology are products of YCG, LLC dba The YOU Institute. The curriculum has been approved for continuing education by The California State Board of Behavioral Sciences, The Board of Registered Nursing and the International Coach Federation. The ULT Performance Report is helpful to employers and various agencies seeking compatibility in people placement as well as professionals trained in relationship management and psychotherapy. Your ULT Performance Report adds intrinsic value in fortifying relationships, seeking a career, preparing for marriage, selecting a roommate and in better understanding yourself and others.

The ULT Summary Report addresses the following:

        Your unique natural expression of self

        Talents that motivate and prompt you to participate in life

        What you can tolerate in terms of people, places and things

        How you connect, learn and commit experiences to memory

        Your perception of life that defines your physical reality

        How much energy you currently have available to succeed

name: Greed
text: MONETARY DISCERNMENT is a licensed motivating force for you. This means you are very deliberate in how you spend your money. This feature means that financial security, meeting your needs, and having enough is very important to you. Issues around money occupy your thoughts frequently throughout the day. Because this is what drives you, creating and cultivating great wealth is easily accessible to you. However, in states of fatigue, addiction or illness you may overspend and exceed your means to the point of personal destitution. Make sure you exercise your natural ability to initiate abundance. Not everyone comes with a Natural understanding of prosperity. You do. Use it. This means that you understand that prosperity manifests as a result of keeping money flowing in and out of your life. Be mindful of the FLOW of money and all that support its significance. When you give, you receive. Any pause to hoard or conserve will create congestion and your ability to cultivate GREAT wealth will cease.

name: Moving
text: This Center is happiest when it is physically moving. This can most easily be identified in people that can't sit still, are fidgeting, stretching or feeling the need to constantly make physical adjustments. Athletes, dancers and very busy individuals are often moving centered. Your Moving Center helps you to make an initial connection to people, places or things. You will comprehend and assimilate information best while moving. It's not unusual for a moving centered person to be able to read in the car or while on the treadmill. Remember this when you are experiencing a creative block and try an activity that allows you to move. You may be surprised at your inspirational results.

name: Naivete
text: OPTIMISM motivates you and is responsible for creating the fun in your life. This is a very positive wonderful feature. You are extremely open and trusting which creates an availability factor about you that attracts others to you. You have a vast perspective on life and create from a fun loving intent. This effervescent child-like quality is very appealing. You are open to new experiences and adapt easily to change. Your nature has fragility about it in that your energy can easily be exhausted if circumstances do not provide fun, joy or laughter. These life sustaining elements are necessary for you to move forward, enabling you to succeed rather than fail. With this as your motivating force you typically see life through rose colored glasses focusing on the wondrous. This naÃ¯ve perception often times can be received as vulnerable, gullible and lacking credibility. It is this same light-hearted innocence that draws others to you like a moth to a flame. You like to have fun and make fun and do it with a natural radiance! When you are coming from a place of clarity this behavior is very becoming however, when you are experiencing a loss of energy or your optimism is squashed the tendency to react in a somewhat immature manner will prevail. It is vital for you to eat right, get plenty of rest and exercise.

name: Mercury
text: This part of you processes information at the speed of light allowing you to think fast and move quickly. You have a laser focus when it comes to identifying what is not working. This is the mark of a surgical strategist. You definitely choose what information needs to be revealed for the completion of your agenda and you are very good at keeping secrets. This part of you can be somewhat cunning, clever and even sneaky at times. You frequently enlist this characteristic when trying to get things done behind the scenes without too much unnecessary energy expense on the part of you or others. This is an asset in getting things done efficiently. You enjoy engaging in quick witted conversation that shifts one's attention from one thing to another without taking a topic to any great level. You actually enjoy exploring and investigating. This curious nature creates a mysterious quality about you that continues to pique the interest of others. You can size up situations quickly, providing just enough information to get the job done.

name: Mercury
text: You naturally process all of the information that effects the management of your day by first seeing what is not working. Because this part of you is considered a processor as well as a home for behavior, it operates at lightning speed and is quick to deliver an outcome in terms of registering an opinion or suggestion. However, because it determines what is not working within a relationship environment first, you frequently assume the role of troubleshooter.  This requires your natural covert approach to business and life but can make you an easy target for criticism. You come across as mysterious and withholding at times. This attribute is great for keeping the troops calm until it is absolutely necessary for them to know. The impression of being sneaky and perhaps even deceptive may prevail but your nature is to make sure that all aspects of dis-ease are identified before sounding the alarm. This allows for pleasant surprises in business and in life with revolutionary displays of breaking news. Additionally, this mysterious and curious nature can be very alluring and attractive. It keeps the curious drawn to you.

name: Willfullness
text: Perseverance is a motivating force for you. Performing Tasks fuels you. You have the persistence to complete almost any assignment despite numerous and sometimes seemingly insurmountable obstacles. This feature does not know the meaning of giving up and once you commit to something you will see it through to the end. Because of this tenacious persevering attitude, reliability surfaces as a supportive, consistent and virtuous by-product. Persistence is a desirable quality to have when assigning duties and responsibilities. This makes you an asset at work or to any employer. The challenge with this talent comes when you experience fatigue, addiction, or illness. When this happens stubborn behavior frequently follows. Digging in your heals, rejecting necessary change, or blocking new growth and becoming close minded are some examples of predictable responses. Your personal responsibility is to stay clear and on task by engaging in nurturing activities that promote rest and much deserved relaxation. This will permit you free sailing when it comes to completing assignments, staying on purpose while enhancing the lives of others.

Polarity represents your "PERCEPTION" of life and defines your electromagnetic potential. It is either positive, negative or neutral and demonstrates whether you find what is working or what is not working first in a situation or environment, or both simultaneously. All are good. It's just your personal approach. Each individual in your life has a set of 'glasses' through which they perceive every situation. Recognizing and understanding differences in another's perception of life provides a space for mutual respect.

You possess a POSITIVE polarity. This means magnetically you typically attract individuals that are more negatively polarized than yourself. They are drawn to you and vice versa. They will always see what is not working first where you see what is working first with quiet thoughts of the other in the back of your mind. You actually do well with those that are more negative than yourself as it compliments your existence and allows you to conserve valuable energy. However, too much of a negative pull can make you feel uncomfortable and even oxygen deprived. Take time to create and embrace life as a means of sustaining the integrity of your natural polarity.

You possess a NEGATIVE polarity. This means magnetically you typically attract individuals that are slightly more positively polarized than yourself. They are drawn to you and vice versa. They will have a more neutral perception of an environment or situation where you will see what is not working first. You actually do well with those that are slightly more positively charged than yourself as it compliments your existence and allows you to conserve valuable energy. However, too much of a positive pull can exhaust you and leave you feeling depressed or overwhelmed.

You possess a NEUTRAL polarity and this gives you the ability to see both what is working and what is not working concurrently in a situation or environment. This also means magnetically you attract individuals that are neutrally or slightly positively charged. The extra positive pull attracts them to you and vice versa. This is important to know. However, too much of a negative pull or a positive pull in either direction can make you feel uncomfortable and even disrespected. Just remember, because you are able to see both approaches, this may delay your decision making process.

You possess a POSITIVE polarity. This means magnetically you typically attract individuals that are slightly more negatively polarized than yourself. They are drawn to you and vice versa. They may see what is not working first where you see what is working first in a situation or environment. You actually do well with those that are somewhat more negative than yourself as it compliments your existence and allows you to conserve valuable energy. However, too much of a negative pull can make you feel uncomfortable and even oxygen deprived. Take time to create and embrace life as a means of sustaining the integrity of your natural polarity.

name: Saturn
text: You are a natural born leader and do not have to campaign for authority because people just naturally trust your abilities. Others turn to you for direction because they innately know you are competent. People listen to you with confidence. You are able to see the big picture in most circumstances and can arrive at a solution for the benefit of all concerned. This is an active, yet benevolent presence that naturally becomes you when you need to hold court or take on a more prominent role. Individuals with this natural trait make great leaders, directors, and authoritative figures. They are naturally seen by others as a necessary decision maker when reaching a consensus.

name: Saturn
text: You possess a regal and majestic disposition that naturally makes you a leader. This noble quality gives you the ability to take charge of a situation without having to campaign for authority. It is extremely benevolent and reliable and inspires others to trust you and naturally look to you for direction. It also enables you to take on a panoramic perspective of life giving you the ability to size up the big picture and see whole situations in an instant. Because of this, you are able to set the standards and the tone for the benefit all concerned. You rarely act impulsively and convey a grand purposefulness in your manner. This trait is positive and active in its approach to life.

name: Saturn
text: You are a natural born leader whose positive and benevolent presence exudes authority. This noble quality requires respect in order to achieve success. Your approachable manner helps you maintain that respect. This potential allows you to access a panoramic perspective of any environment enabling you to see whole situations in an instant. In addition, you are able to search for the most diplomatic solution for any moment's dilemma. Because of this you will rarely act impulsively. You are ponderous in your actions and convey a sense of purposefulness in your manner.

name: Saturn
text: You are a natural born leader. There is a majestic quality in you that requires respect and purpose. This is a serene and benevolent presence that naturally becomes you when you need to hold court or take on a more prominent role. This majestic characteristic often presents you with permission to proceed where others might have to prove themselves several times over before inspiring others to trust them. It has others seeing you as a necessary decision maker when reaching a consensus. You are able to see the 'big' picture in most circumstances and able to fashion a solution for the benefit of all concerned. People listen to you. You naturally take on responsibility while holding a positive outcome in mind.

name: Lunar
text: There is a part of you that is quiet and very passive in nature. At times you may come across as being depressed, nostalgic or melancholy when in truth you are just being yourself. You tend to revel in silence and serenity and have a reclusive side to you that often has you hiding your inner feelings. Regardless of the more adventurous aspects of yourself, this part often resists change and draws you to areas of solitude over public states; you can be quite monastic in nature. At the same time, you are extremely astute when it comes to appreciating beauty and the minutia of life that surrounds you. You have a great desire to become one with your surroundings.

name: Lunar
text: You are passive and gentle in your presentation. This is a very devoted and loyal aspect of your nature. Typically non-confrontational, you tend to regard arguing as a waste of time, seldom blow up and are somewhat resistant to change. At the same time, you are incredibly reliable and will work long hours without complaint. You also enjoy being alone at times and go inward for relaxation purposes while enjoying the silence and serenity. You have a great desire for an intimate rapport with your surroundings and you will seek out those environments that make you feel safe and secure. Because of this you are often drawn to areas of solitude over public states and tend to be very monastic in nature.

name: Silver
text: Your test results revealed that you have a SILVER level of refinement. Since alchemy is the main player in relationships, if one's alchemy is too high it can be quite intolerant of others. This is frequently helpful to know in selecting partners, jobs and places to live. The more Silver you have the easier it is to be flexible and tolerant of those around you. Silvers are the easiest to get along with and can move in any environment. By virtue they have an wider compatibility range. Silvers can walk away from a messy room, are a little more flexible and make friends easily! Golds are a little more meticulous and inflexible. Unlike yourself, they would take issue with the little annoyances that come with kids, messes and things left lying about. A Copper on the other hand actually thrives more in a disheveled environment and even requires it. Both Gold and Copper can be tolerated by you. However, they cannot tolerate one another. Silvers are not messy but many have organized piles. In addition, you are quite versatile in terms of being able to infiltrate any environment. This means you can go just about anywhere in the world. This is ultimately the ideal alchemy to have in our world today. You will be able to share your gifts with a much larger demographic, have more friends, and be welcome more places than any other refinement level on the planet. The world is essentially at your disposal. This is wonderful but it can create difficulty when there are so many choices. This part of you makes you very accepting of others while in the case of other alchemical combinations it can be the very reason we misjudge others.

name: Silver
text: Your test results revealed that you have a SILVER/COPPER level of refinement. Since alchemy is the main player in relationships, if one's alchemy is too high it can be quite intolerant of others. This is frequently helpful to know in selecting partners, jobs and places to live. The more Silver you have the easier it is to have tolerance for those around us. Silvers are the easiest to get along with and can move in any environment. By virtue they have a wider compatibility range. Silvers can walk away from a messy room, are a little more flexible and make friends easily! Golds are a little more meticulous and inflexible and cannot tolerate a Copper preference at all. They often take issue with the little annoyances that come with kids, messes and things left laying about. A Silver/Copper on the other hand actually tolerates these types of environmental occurrences quite well. They are not repulsed by getting their hands dirty, creating rustic environments or eating things that exceed an organic interpretation. Silver/Coppers usually live in areas that share a relaxed and in some cases, a rural approach to life. They can tolerate quite a bit but do not do well living in areas that have too much Gold. They can however, visit or vacation in these areas for a very short period of time. Both high Silver and low Copper can be tolerated by you. Silvers are not messy but many have organized piles. A Silver/Copper will let the piles lay about and accumulate and rarely feel the need to remove them from sight if company were to arrive. Like the solid Silver you have a much wider spectrum of friends. But, like the Copper, you may have a tendency to be criticized for your lack of urgency or attention to detail when it comes to being tidy and organized. Because your presentation does quite well in both high Silver arenas and low copper venues you have many choices as well as much to see and participate in during your lifetime. Traveling to under developed countries and living among the natives comes natural to you, as long as it is only temporary. You can tolerate smells and the lack of creature comforts quite well. Silver/Coppers and Golds frequently misjudge one another. Be considerate of the alchemy of others as it is often the very reason we misjudge.

name: Silver
text: Your test results revealed that you have a SILVER/GOLD level of refinement. Since alchemy is the main player in relationships, if one's alchemy is too high it can be quite intolerant of others. This is frequently helpful to know in selecting partners, jobs and places to live. The more silver you have the easier it is to have tolerance for those around us. Silvers are the easiest to get along with and can move in any environment. By virtue they have a wider compatibility range. Silvers can walk away from a messy room, are a little more flexible and make friends easily! Golds are a little more meticulous and inflexible. They often take issue with the little annoyances that come with kids, messes and things left laying about. A Silver/Gold on the other hand actually tolerates these types of environmental occurrences quite well simply because of the Silver factor. Silver/ Golds usually live in areas that share a relaxed yet refined approach to life. They can tolerate quite a bit but do not do well living in areas that are too Copper. They can however, visit or vacation in these areas for a short period of time. Both Gold and some Copper can be tolerated by you. However, they cannot tolerate one another. Silvers are not messy but many have organized piles. A Silver/Gold will not let the piles lay about too long and will definitely remove them from sight if company were to arrive. Like the solid Silver you have a much wider spectrum of friends. But, like the Gold, you may have a tendency to voice judgment where nature simply exists. Your presentation does quite well in both high Gold arenas and low Silver venues. This means you have many choices as well as much to see and participate in during your lifetime. Be considerate of the alchemy of others as it is often the very reason we misjudge.
Styles are your natural physical "TRAITS" that determine how nature shows up in you. These traits assist in providing unique insight into a person's capabilities and natural talents.

name: Venusian
text: This is the more passive part of you that offers a very positive perspective, sending a signal that everything is going to be okay. In matters of managing a crisis, be it at the office or at home, you are often the calm in the storm. You have a nurturing quality and a genuine presentation of concern for others. People feel this when in your company because it is authentic. This is one of the many things people like about you. You are very relaxed and inviting and adapt easily to new environments. This allows you to produce a response of acceptance in any situation allowing you to become whatever you need to be to be successful. To embrace the natural talents of this trait, you must recharge midday with a brief power nap or longer if possible. Organize your schedule at work or while traveling to accommodate this. Whole countries with this same trait are known to shut down between 2 and 5 p.m. Don't go without.

name: Venusian
text: You are very relaxed and inviting. Often referred to as the "sexy" quality, this trait has a sensual disposition. This is a passive quality that may be misinterpreted as being "lazy" versus "relaxed". The significance of this laid back demonstration often sends a purposeful signal that everything is going to be okay. In matters of managing a crisis, be it at the office or at home, you are often the calm in the storm. This aspect of your physicality has a nurturing quality and a genuine presentation of concern for others. People feel this when in your company because it is authentic. This is one of the many things people like about you. To embrace the natural talents of this trait, you must recharge midday with a brief power nap or longer if possible. Organize your schedule at work or while traveling to accommodate this. Whole countries with this same trait are known to shut down between 2 and 5 p.m. Don't go without.

name: Tramp
text: The TRAVELER is a motivating force for you. This feature represents a unique free spirit. It relishes new experiences and welcomes the unpredictable. Realizing the term invokes many thoughts and ideas with regards to reliability, it's necessary to recognize that this very charming feature embraces many things but commits to few. You are easily convinced to go in other directions and are drawn to adventure. The company gold watch and living in the house you grew up in often falls short of your natural desires. You thrive by seeking new innovative and explorative opportunities. Everything that you do must be ever changing. Dining at a variety of places, indulging in different types of pursuits, and traveling about freely is very important. When this feature marries or is in a monogamous relationship it is important that variety be present in terms of physical engagement. Repetition and predictable activities will rob you of necessary energy thus leaving you no choice but to seek vitality elsewhere.

name: Lunatic
text: Entertaining the VISION motivates you. With a visionary's perspective... expect the unexpected. This simply means that you love spontaneity and embrace surprises. You are creative, colorful and have many different expressions. Though at times this feature may be misunderstood, you are able to easily think outside the box which allows for startlingly original ideas bordering on genius. This is a visionary's feature. This intelligent foresight often demonstrates itself involuntarily in various ways. It frequently conducts itself in extremes displaying great joy or great sadness. Authentic performance serves as a catalyst for personal gifts to appear. The purposefulness that arises out of this driving feature is that it also has the capacity to expose the inadequacies in others and thus challenges their comfort zones. This is not necessarily an undesirable outcome as it initiates growth for everyone.
